cron_frequency.summary: Run every 5min, single cron body for all tasks

retry_budget_kv.summary: JSON object with count+timestamps in KV

inflight_kv_tracking.summary: Stage+timestamp+submissionId in KV, delete on completion

staleness_warning.summary: 3min UX warning, 5min recovery trigger, two thresholds

admin_timeout_metrics.summary: Pre-aggregated hourly KV buckets by classification, follows QUEUE_METRICS_KV pattern
